compatibility_projection_summary: Legacy flat phase fields now project into grouped intent, contract, and evidencePolicy sections during template normalization while preserving accepted original and unknown fields.

Grouped-only phase contracts now normalize into the existing startable registry shape by deriving flat name, instructions, requiredIntake, handoffRules, outputArtifact, completionCriteria, and transition fields without requiring duplicate flat authoring fields.

Session-owned runtimeState is stripped from template persistence on create/update while preserving unknown config, template, phase, output artifact, completion criteria, transition, skill, and required artifact fields.
validation_rejection_summary: Grouped constraint strengths outside their owning section are rejected with WORKFLOW_PHASE_CONSTRAINT_STRENGTH_INVALID.
Plugin skill references without non-empty plugin provenance are rejected with WORKFLOW_PHASE_SKILL_INVALID_PROVENANCE.
